studies.title: Quiz Application for Students
studies.summary: Optimized self-paced learning for students from low-income families. Focused on reducing cognitive load and improving completion rates in resource-constrained environments.

studies.title: User Management Application
studies.summary: Reduced administrative effort and time for teachers while scaling the application globally. Restructured information architecture to support multi-region operations.

studies.title: Hotel Booking Experience
studies.summary: Improved preference integration during the traveller decision process. Designed filtering and recommendation patterns that reduced search-to-book friction.

studies.title: Event Management Application
studies.summary: Improved visibility for business on teacher empowerment programs while making events discoverable for all teachers.

studies.title: Fintech Customer Portal
studies.summary: Responsive web design for a financial services customer portal. Early responsive implementation solving complex data display challenges on mobile.
